retrieval_results.context:
The user plans to purchase a nylon collar from Yellow Dog Design for Max, a Golden Retriever, and will include an engraved name tag.
The user is seeking a reliable dog walker in their area and is evaluating whether the walker can administer Max's flea and tick prevention medication every two weeks.
The user intends to give Max a Kong Toy stuffed with peanut butter, as Max loves peanut butter and the Kong provides interactive stimulation while the user is away.
